title: Never Forget Meeting Notes with Fireflies.ai

posts.author: tanner_elevate (Tanner Nelson | Elevate Operations)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey team,

Meetings are important—but taking and sharing notes can be a pain. That’s where Fireflies.ai comes in. It integrates with monday.com to automatically capture, transcribe, and log meeting notes.

  • Join Zoom/Teams/Google Meet calls and get instant transcripts.
  • Sync meeting recaps into your monday.com boards.
  • Highlight key action items so nothing gets missed.

This has saved our team hours every week.

Try Fireflies.ai here!
